verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God is not a man, that He should lie; Neither the son of man, that He should repent: Hath He said, and shall He not do it? Or hath He spoken, And shall He not make it good? Behold I have received commandment to bless: And He hath blessed; And I cannot reverse it. For God is not a man, that He should lie, Neither the son of man that He should repent.
